notes: 12-bin hybrid global distribution for trendy_nee_iav. Bin 1: near-zero (< 5 gC m-2 yr-1). Bins 2–12: 11 equal-area quantile bins. Q_PROBS = (1:10)/11. KG land mask: koppen_geiger_0p5.tif.
